name: cycletime
description: CycleTime - Intelligent Project Orchestration Platform with MCP Integration

scripts.start: npm run docker:up && npm run health
scripts.restart: npm run stop && npm run start
scripts.reset: npm run docker:clean && npm run setup
scripts.docker:clean:all: docker compose down -v --remove-orphans && docker system prune -f
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose down && docker compose up -d --build
scripts.infrastructure:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio
scripts.infrastructure:down: docker compose stop postgres redis minio
scripts.services:up: docker compose up -d api-gateway web-dashboard mcp-server claude-service document-service task-service
scripts.services:down: docker compose stop api-gateway web-dashboard mcp-server claude-service document-service task-service
scripts.db:connect: docker compose exec postgres psql -U cycletime -d cycletime_dev
scripts.db:connect:test: docker compose exec postgres psql -U cycletime -d cycletime_test
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down postgres && docker volume rm cycletime_postgres_data && npm run infrastructure:up
scripts.redis:monitor: docker compose exec redis redis-cli monitor
scripts.redis:flush: docker compose exec redis redis-cli flushall
scripts.web:all: npm run minio:web && npm run adminer:web && npm run redis-insight:web
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:api-gateway" "npm run dev:web-dashboard" "npm run dev:mcp-server"
scripts.logs:infrastructure: docker compose logs -f postgres redis minio
scripts.logs:services: docker compose logs -f api-gateway web-dashboard mcp-server claude-service document-service task-service
scripts.test:integration: echo "Integration tests not yet implemented" && exit 1

author: Spiral House
